title: Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali
tagline: Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Kalleshwara Temple (also spelled Kallesvara or Kalleshwara) is a temple located in the village of Bagali (called Balgali in ancient inscriptions).
overview.description: Kalleshwara Temple (also spelled Kallesvara or Kalleshwara) is a temple located in the village of Bagali (called Balgali in ancient inscriptions). It is 9 km away from Harpanahalli in the Vijayanagara district of Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Harapanahalli
topPlaces.description: Harapanahalli is a small city, taluk and sub-divisional headquarter in Vijayanagara District in the Indian state of Karnataka. In 1947, the 30th Kannada Sahithya Sammelana was organised in Harapanahalli under the presidency of C.K.Venkataramaiah.

topPlaces.name: Advimallanakeri
topPlaces.description: Advimallanakeri & Adavimallanakeri Thanda are the neighborhood villages in the southern state of Karnataka, India. these are located in the Hadagalli taluk of Vijayanagara District in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Adavihalli
topPlaces.description: Adavihalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Harapanahalli taluk of Davanagere district.

items.note: Harapanahalli is a small city, taluk and sub-divisional headquarter in Vijayanagara District in the Indian state of Karnataka. In 1947, the 30th Kannada Sahithya Sammelana was organised in Harapanahalli under the presidency of C.K.Venkataramaiah.
Advimallanakeri & Adavimallanakeri Thanda are the neighborhood villages in the southern state of Karnataka, India. these are located in the Hadagalli taluk of Vijayanagara District in Karnataka.
Adavihalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Harapanahalli taluk of Davanagere district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (107 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali?
faq.a: Stays in Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalleshvara Temple, Bagali?
faq.a: The top attractions are Harapanahalli, Advimallanakeri, Adavihalli.
